subject: [PATCH v2 10/21] fuse: prepare to cache statx attributes from entry replies

2026-05-16.patch_summary: This patch prepares the fuse kernel module to cache statx attributes from entry replies by adding a new argument to the fuse_iget function, which will store the statx information in the inode's cache. The change is made in preparation for a future patch that will add a new struct fuse_entry2_out outarg containing filled-out statx information returned by the server on LOOKUP/MKDIR/MKNOD requests. Currently, all callers pass NULL as the argument, but this will be updated to use the new statx information once it is available.
